attraction_details.name: Snow Park
attraction_details.description:
Snow City Experience – Key Details

Enjoy exciting snow activities such as zorbing, basketball, dancing, snow rafting, snow mountain climbing, snowballing, fantasy snow castle making, and many more.

Entry Fees:

Weekdays: ₹650/-

Weekends / Holidays / Festivals: ₹750/-

Happy Hours Offer (Weekdays Only):

First three slots: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM

Offer Price: ₹500/-

Valid only for online bookings made 1 day prior

Winterful Wednesdays Offer:

Any slot on Wednesdays at ₹500/-

Valid only for online bookings made 1 day prior

Happy Hours offer is not applicable on weekends, national holidays, or festivals.

Socks are mandatory; guests may carry their own or purchase at the Snow World reception counter.

Camera/Mobile Usage Charges: ₹50/-

Jackets, gloves, and snow boots are provided free of cost on a returnable basis.
